_comment: Hook events from Reasonix v1.17.20. Lifecycle: SessionStart → idle; UserPromptSubmit → working; Notification (approval dialog) → blocked; PreToolUse (write tools) → blocked; PostToolUse → working; Stop → idle; SessionEnd → release.

SessionStart.description: herdr: ensure idle state on session start

UserPromptSubmit.description: herdr: report working when user submits a prompt

Notification.description: herdr: report blocked when approval is needed (e.g. tool permission dialog)

PreToolUse.description: herdr: report blocked when file-writer tool is about to execute

PostToolUse.description: herdr: restore working after each tool call (transitions blocked→working)

Stop.description: herdr: report idle when turn ends

SessionEnd.description: herdr: release agent label when session ends
